wallet vault/native runtime configuration and trust boundaries
backend payload API, signing, and broadcast service endpoints with owners
proof-consumer deployment mode and trust-anchor or canonical-CID policy

wallet, exchange, API, policy, HSM/vault, and runtime monitor source ownership
line-level mappings from source to each blocking/high production claim
explicit out-of-scope rationale for any Xaman-only artifact not deployed in production

production source inventory from PORTAL-CXTP-078

production claim set mapped into SecurityModelIR domains and proof obligations

claim completeness gate for every blocking/high production claim
